case_title: RONALD MITCHELL VS. SUTTER HEALTH ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-07-2022 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-04-2022 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-09-2021 CONTINUED TO AUG-11-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-05-2021 CONTINUED TO FEB-01-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. There being no appearance the court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2022 Continued To Oct-04-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff Pro Per Ronald Mitchell is sanction $400.00. OSC is reset to Oct-04-2022. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Continued To Aug-09-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 9, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
